specs.title: should create a single product without variant successfully (basic)
should create a single product without variant successfully (full journey)
should prevent selling price less than cost price (case 1)
should prevent promo price greater than selling price (case 1)
should prevent selling price less than cost price (case 2)
should prevent promo price greater than selling price (case 2)
should prevent low stock threshold greater than stock quantity (case 1)
should prevent low stock threshold greater than stock quantity (case 2)
should validate threshold equal to stock quantity
should prevent stock quantity of zero
should prevent negative stock quantity
should require product name when creating a single product without variant
should require category
should prevent product name exceeding maximum length
should trim leading and trailing spaces from product name
should prevent description exceeding maximum length
should prevent non numeric values in cost price
should prevent non numeric values in selling price
should prevent non numeric values in promo price
should prevent negative cost price
should prevent negative selling price
should prevent negative promo price
should enforce maximum of five images
should remove uploaded image successfully
should prevent invalid image url upload
should allow exactly five images
should prevent assigning quantity greater than available stock
should assign stock across multiple locations
should remove assigned location successfully
should prevent allocation exceeding stock quantity across branches
should cancel product creation
should display correct product information in preview modal
should close product preview modal
should create a product successfully via api
should display correct product details in pending approval
should allow a partner to log in successfully
